Hada Commerce

AI-extensible e-commerce platform powered by Harness. The store ships with full commerce functionality, and an embedded AI agent can create pages, manage products, run promotions, and extend the platform through a plugin marketplace.

Go 1.26 + FiberReact 19 + TanStackTailwind v4PostgreSQL 16Harness AI AgentPlugin Marketplace

Architecture Overview

DDD modular architecture following the Manifesto pattern. Each domain has 5 layers: entity, port (interfaces), service, infrastructure (Postgres), and API (HTTP handlers).

Config
hada-commerce/
  backend/          Go API server (DDD domains)
    internal/       12 domain packages
    cmd/            Entry point + DI container
    migrations/     PostgreSQL schema (14 tables)
  frontend/         React SPA
    src/pages/      Admin (8 pages) + Storefront (6 pages)
    src/lib/        API client, TanStack Query hooks, cart context

Admin Panel

Admin Dashboard

The central command center for store owners. Displays key metrics (total products, orders, pages, active promos), secondary stats (revenue, customers, conversion rate), and a live recent orders table with color-coded status badges. Built with Lucide icons and Tailwind CSS.

Products Management

Full CRUD interface for managing the product catalog. Features a search bar, inline create/edit form, status badges (draft/active/archived), low-stock highlighting, price display in the store currency, and edit/delete actions. Products are fetched via TanStack Query with automatic cache invalidation on mutations.

Orders Management

Order tracking dashboard with status filter dropdown. Each order shows customer info, total amount, and color-coded status badges (pending=yellow, confirmed=blue, processing=indigo, shipped=purple, delivered=green, cancelled=red). Click to expand rows showing individual order items and shipping address details.

CMS Pages

The heart of the AI-powered CMS. Lists all storefront pages with their current status (draft, pending_review, published, archived). When the AI agent creates a page, it lands as pending_review. Admins can preview pages in an iframe, edit the raw HTML and CSS in tabbed code editors, modify SEO metadata, and publish with a single click. Full version history is maintained.

Promo Codes

Discount code manager supporting three promo types: percentage off, fixed amount off, and free shipping. Each promo shows its code, discount value, usage tracking (used/max), validity period, and active status. Admins can create new promos with min order thresholds and date ranges, or toggle active/inactive status.

Media Gallery

Media asset manager with drag-and-drop upload support. Displays uploaded files in a responsive image grid with thumbnails. Hover to reveal delete overlay. Shows file size and upload date for each asset. Designed for product images, page banners, and marketing materials.

AI Agent Chat

Chat interface for the embedded harness AI agent. Store owners can ask the agent to create products, build landing pages, set up promotions, analyze sales data, and more. Messages display with user bubbles (blue, right-aligned) and agent responses (gray, left-aligned). Shows a thinking spinner during processing and tool-use indicators when the agent calls backend services.

Plugin Marketplace

Browse and install extensions that add new capabilities to the store. Each plugin card shows name, version, author, and an install button. Installed plugins appear in a separate table with status badges and management actions (settings, open, uninstall). Plugins can add new admin tabs, storefront widgets, and AI agent tools — all via a manifest.json declaration.

Customer Storefront

Store Homepage

Customer-facing storefront landing page with a hero section, featured products grid pulled from the product catalog, category navigation cards, a perks/benefits bar (free shipping, secure checkout, etc.), and a call-to-action banner. Server data is fetched via TanStack Query and rendered in a responsive grid layout.

Product Catalog

Browsable product catalog with a filter sidebar (category, price range, sort options) and a responsive product grid that adapts from 1 to 4 columns. Each product card shows the image, name, price, and an add-to-cart button. Pagination controls at the bottom for large catalogs.

Shopping Cart

Cart page showing selected items with quantity controls (increment/decrement/remove), a free-shipping progress bar showing how close the customer is to qualifying, and an order summary sidebar with subtotal, shipping estimate, and checkout button. Cart state is persisted to localStorage via a React context provider.

Checkout

Checkout flow with a shipping address form (name, email, street, city, state, postal code, country), an order summary sidebar showing cart items and totals, a promo code input field that validates against the backend, and a Place Order button. After successful order placement, displays a confirmation with the order ID.

AI Agent Integration (Harness)

The embedded harness agent has 8 tools that wrap domain services. It can create products, build CMS pages (HTML + CSS), manage promos, query orders, and search the catalog. All agent-created content lands in a pending_review state for human approval.

CreatePageTool
UpdatePageTool
ListPagesTool
CreateProductTool
ListProductsTool
CreatePromoTool
QueryOrdersTool
SearchCatalogTool

Plugin Marketplace

Self-service extension system. Each plugin declares its manifest (UI tabs, storefront widgets, agent tools, DB migrations). Plugins run in sandboxed iframes with scoped database access and namespaced API routes. The AI agent gains new tools when plugins are installed.

Product ReviewsPlugin
Loyalty PointsPlugin
Email CampaignsPlugin
Advanced AnalyticsPlugin

Hada Commerce — Built with Go, React, PostgreSQL, and Harness AI
